title: Cuban-Style Bread Pudding
description: A rich and creamy dessert made with whole wheat bread, perfect for a cozy evening.

ingredients.name: Whole Wheat Bread
ingredients.notes: Any type of whole wheat bread works well

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the eggs, granulated sugar, and brown sugar.
Add in the heavy cream, vanilla extract, and cinnamon. Whisk until well combined.
Add in the cubed bread and toss until the bread is evenly coated with the egg mixture.
Pour the bread mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the bread is set.
Remove the bread pudding from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve warm, topped with your favorite toppings such as whipped cream or a caramel sauce.
